---
title: "ACTwatch Indicator 3.3 - Median Sales Volume of Malaria Blood Tests"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output: 
  word_document:
    toc: false
    toc_depth: 2
    reference_docx: null
---

## Indicator Definition

**Indicator Group:** Volume - Median diagnostic sales volumes all outlets

**Description:** The median sales volume of malaria blood test products by test type and outlet type

**Numerator:** Median volume of sales for a specific diagnostic product/category

**Denominator:** All outlets with volume data available for that product/category

**Disaggregation:** By diagnostic type and outlet type; additional disaggregation by strata if available

**Data Source:** Product data (long format) - RDT/diagnostic dataset

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, 
                      fig.width = 12, fig.height = 8)

library(tidyverse)
library(survey)
library(openxlsx)
library(forcats)
library(here)
library(data.table)

# Set parameters
if (!exists("country")) stop("Global variable 'country' not found")
if (!exists("year")) stop("Global variable 'year' not found") 


# Configuration matching the Stata analysis structure
indicator_config <- list(
  indicator_id = "3.3",
  title = "Median Sales Volume of Malaria Blood Tests", 
  description = "Median sales volume of diagnostic products by type and outlet",
  
  # Analysis settings
  dataset = "product", # Product data in long format (RDT/diagnostic data)
  analysis_type = "volume",
  survey_weight = "wt_alloutlet", # Standard outlet weight for volume analysis
  population_filter = quote(booster == 0 & !is.na(volume)), # Products with volume data, no booster
  
  # Outlet types (matching Stata outvars1)
  outlet_dummies = c("private_nonprofit", "private_forprofit", "pharmacy",
                    "laboratory", "drug_store", "total_informal", "total_retail", "wholesale"),
  outlet_labels = list(
    "private_nonprofit" = "Private Not-for-Profit",
    "private_forprofit" = "Private For-Profit", 
    "pharmacy" = "Pharmacy",
    "laboratory" = "Laboratory", 
    "drug_store" = "Drug Store",
    "total_informal" = "Informal (Total)",
    "total_retail" = "Retail (Total)",
    "wholesale" = "Wholesaler"
  ),

  # Volume coverage variables for diagnostics (matching Stata dvol_cov)
  volume_vars = c(
    "total",              # Any diagnostic/blood test
    "rdt",                # Rapid diagnostic test
    "microscopy"          # Microscopy
  ),
  
  # Product labels for better display
  volume_labels = list(
    "total" = "Any malaria blood test",
    "rdt" = "Rapid diagnostic test (RDT)",
    "microscopy" = "Microscopy"
  ),
  
  # Output settings
  file_suffix = "Median sales volume of tests"
)
```

```{r load_data, include=FALSE}
# Load product data (long format) - RDT/diagnostic dataset
data_file <- here("Data", "Final data", 
                  paste0(country, "_", year, "_rdt_micro_data.csv"))

if (!file.exists(data_file)) {
  stop("Data file not found: ", data_file)
}

product_data <- fread(data_file) %>%
  # Ensure strata variables are character
  mutate(across(any_of(c("strata1", "strata2")), as.character)) %>%
  # Clean up blank but non-missing strata values
  mutate(
    strata1 = dplyr::na_if(strata1, ""),
    strata2 = dplyr::na_if(strata2, "")
  ) %>%
  # Drop if outlet category information is missing (following Stata logic)
  filter(!is.na(outcat2))
```

```{r data_processing, include=FALSE}
# Following Stata logic: ensure outlet variables are coded as 0/1
available_outlet_vars <- intersect(indicator_config$outlet_dummies, names(product_data))

processed_data <- product_data %>%
  # Recode outlet variables (following Stata: recode `x'(.=0) if total==1)
  mutate(
    across(all_of(available_outlet_vars), 
           ~ifelse(is.na(.) & total == 1, 0, .))
  ) %>%
  # Apply population filter
  filter(!!indicator_config$population_filter)

# Detect strata structure
strata_info <- list()
if ("strata1" %in% names(processed_data) && 
    length(unique(na.omit(processed_data$strata1))) > 1) {
  strata1_values <- unique(na.omit(processed_data$strata1))
  strata1_values <- strata1_values[strata1_values != "" & !is.na(trimws(strata1_values))]
  if (length(strata1_values) > 1) {
    strata_info$strata1 <- list(variable = "strata1", values = strata1_values)
  }
}

if ("strata2" %in% names(processed_data) && 
    length(unique(na.omit(processed_data$strata2))) > 1) {
  strata2_values <- unique(na.omit(processed_data$strata2))
  strata2_values <- strata2_values[strata2_values != "" & !is.na(trimws(strata2_values))]
  if (length(strata2_values) > 1) {
    strata_info$strata2 <- list(variable = "strata2", values = strata2_values)
  }
}

has_strata1 <- "strata1" %in% names(strata_info)
has_strata2 <- "strata2" %in% names(strata_info)
cross_strata_possible <- has_strata1 && has_strata2
```

```{r survey_setup, include=FALSE}
# Setup survey design (following Stata: svyset c4 [pweight=wt_allOutlet], strata(strata) fpc(fpc))
survey_design <- processed_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(!!sym(indicator_config$survey_weight))) %>%
  as_survey_design(
    ids = c4,
    weights = !!sym(indicator_config$survey_weight),
    strata = strata1,  # Using strata1 as primary design strata
    fpc = fpc
  )
```

```{r analysis_functions, include=FALSE}
# Calculate median sales volume using weighted percentiles (standardized output format)
calculate_volume_medians <- function(survey_data, group_vars = NULL) {
  
  results <- tibble()
  
  # Available volume variables in the dataset
  available_volume_vars <- intersect(indicator_config$volume_vars, 
                                    names(survey_data$variables))
  
  # Available outlet variables in the dataset  
  available_outlet_vars <- intersect(indicator_config$outlet_dummies, 
                                    names(survey_data$variables))
  
  for (volume_var in available_volume_vars) {
    for (outlet_var in available_outlet_vars) {
      
      tryCatch({
        if (is.null(group_vars)) {
          # National analysis - following the working sub-analysis pattern
          outlet_data_raw <- survey_data$variables %>%
            filter(!!sym(outlet_var) == 1, 
                   !!sym(volume_var) == 1,
                   !is.na(volume))
          
          if (nrow(outlet_data_raw) > 5) {  # Sufficient observations
            # Use weighted percentiles directly on the raw data
            if (requireNamespace("statar", quietly = TRUE)) {
              percentiles <- statar::pctile(
                outlet_data_raw$volume, 
                probs = c(0.25, 0.50, 0.75),
                wt = outlet_data_raw[[indicator_config$survey_weight]]
              )
              
              result_row <- tibble(
                antimalarial_type = volume_var,  # Standardized name for common Excel function
                outlet_type = outlet_var,
                point_estimate = percentiles[2],  # Median as point estimate
                lower_ci = percentiles[1],        # Q25 as lower bound
                upper_ci = percentiles[3],        # Q75 as upper bound
                sample_size = nrow(outlet_data_raw),
                antimalarial_label = indicator_config$volume_labels[[volume_var]] %||% volume_var,
                outlet_label = indicator_config$outlet_labels[[outlet_var]] %||% outlet_var
              )
              
              results <- bind_rows(results, result_row)
            } else {
              # Fallback to survey package if statar not available
              subset_design <- subset(survey_data, 
                                     !!sym(outlet_var) == 1 & 
                                     !!sym(volume_var) == 1 &
                                     !is.na(volume))
              
              q25 <- svyquantile(~volume, subset_design, quantiles = 0.25, method = "constant")
              q50 <- svyquantile(~volume, subset_design, quantiles = 0.50, method = "constant") 
              q75 <- svyquantile(~volume, subset_design, quantiles = 0.75, method = "constant")
              
              result_row <- tibble(
                antimalarial_type = volume_var,  # Standardized name for common Excel function
                outlet_type = outlet_var,
                point_estimate = as.numeric(q50),  # Median as point estimate
                lower_ci = as.numeric(q25),        # Q25 as lower bound
                upper_ci = as.numeric(q75),        # Q75 as upper bound
                sample_size = nrow(outlet_data_raw),
                antimalarial_label = indicator_config$volume_labels[[volume_var]] %||% volume_var,
                outlet_label = indicator_config$outlet_labels[[outlet_var]] %||% outlet_var
              )
              
              results <- bind_rows(results, result_row)
            }
          }
          
        } else {
          # Strata analysis
          strata_values <- unique(survey_data$variables[[group_vars[1]]])
          strata_values <- strata_values[!is.na(strata_values)]
          
          for (strata_val in strata_values) {
            outlet_data_raw <- survey_data$variables %>%
              filter(!!sym(group_vars[1]) == strata_val,
                     !!sym(outlet_var) == 1, 
                     !!sym(volume_var) == 1,
                     !is.na(volume))
            
            if (nrow(outlet_data_raw) > 5) {
              if (requireNamespace("statar", quietly = TRUE)) {
                percentiles <- statar::pctile(
                  outlet_data_raw$volume, 
                  probs = c(0.25, 0.50, 0.75),
                  wt = outlet_data_raw[[indicator_config$survey_weight]]
                )
                
                result_row <- tibble(
                  antimalarial_type = volume_var,  # Standardized name for common Excel function
                  outlet_type = outlet_var,
                  point_estimate = percentiles[2],  # Median as point estimate
                  lower_ci = percentiles[1],        # Q25 as lower bound
                  upper_ci = percentiles[3],        # Q75 as upper bound
                  sample_size = nrow(outlet_data_raw),
                  antimalarial_label = indicator_config$volume_labels[[volume_var]] %||% volume_var,
                  outlet_label = indicator_config$outlet_labels[[outlet_var]] %||% outlet_var
                )
                
                result_row[[group_vars[1]]] <- as.character(strata_val)
                results <- bind_rows(results, result_row)
              } else {
                # Fallback to survey package
                subset_design <- subset(survey_data, 
                                       !!sym(group_vars[1]) == strata_val &
                                       !!sym(outlet_var) == 1 & 
                                       !!sym(volume_var) == 1 &
                                       !is.na(volume))
                
                q25 <- svyquantile(~volume, subset_design, quantiles = 0.25, method = "constant")
                q50 <- svyquantile(~volume, subset_design, quantiles = 0.50, method = "constant")
                q75 <- svyquantile(~volume, subset_design, quantiles = 0.75, method = "constant")
                
                result_row <- tibble(
                  antimalarial_type = volume_var,  # Standardized name for common Excel function
                  outlet_type = outlet_var,
                  point_estimate = as.numeric(q50),  # Median as point estimate
                  lower_ci = as.numeric(q25),        # Q25 as lower bound
                  upper_ci = as.numeric(q75),        # Q75 as upper bound
                  sample_size = nrow(outlet_data_raw),
                  antimalarial_label = indicator_config$volume_labels[[volume_var]] %||% volume_var,
                  outlet_label = indicator_config$outlet_labels[[outlet_var]] %||% outlet_var
                )
                
                result_row[[group_vars[1]]] <- as.character(strata_val)
                results <- bind_rows(results, result_row)
              }
            }
          }
        }
        
      }, error = function(e) {
        message("Error processing ", volume_var, " in ", outlet_var, ": ", e$message)
      })
    }
  }
  
  return(results)
}
```

```{r footnotes function}

# Calculate footnotes (volume data availability)
calculate_footnotes <- function(data, strata1_var = NULL, strata2_var = NULL) {
  
  # Incomplete interview criteria
  incomplete_criteria <- c(203,204,205,207,208,303,304,305,307,308,309,310)
  
  # Count volume data availability by outlet type
  outlet_counts <- tibble()
  available_outlet_vars <- intersect(indicator_config$outlet_dummies, names(data))
  
  for (outlet_var in available_outlet_vars) {
    outlet_label <- indicator_config$outlet_labels[[outlet_var]] %||% outlet_var
    
    if (is.null(strata1_var)) {
      # National counts
      volume_count <- sum(data[[outlet_var]] == 1 & !is.na(data$volume) & 
                         data$booster == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
      incomplete_count <- sum(data$finalintstat %in% incomplete_criteria & 
                         !is.na(data$volume), na.rm = TRUE)
      
      outlet_counts <- bind_rows(outlet_counts, tibble(
        outlet_type = outlet_var,
        outlet_label = outlet_label,
        volume_n = volume_count,
        incomplete = incomplete_count
      ))
    } else {
      # Strata counts  
      strata_levels <- unique(data[[strata1_var]])
      strata_levels <- strata_levels[!is.na(strata_levels)]
      
      for (strata_val in strata_levels) {
        volume_count <- sum(data[[outlet_var]] == 1 & !is.na(data$volume) &
                           data$booster == 0 & data[[strata1_var]] == strata_val, na.rm = TRUE)
        incomplete_count <- sum(data$finalintstat %in% incomplete_criteria & 
                           !is.na(data$volume) & data[[strata1_var]] == strata_val, na.rm = TRUE)
        
        outlet_counts <- bind_rows(outlet_counts, tibble(
          outlet_type = outlet_var,
          outlet_label = outlet_label,
          strata = strata_val,
          volume_n = volume_count,
          incomplete = incomplete_count
        ))
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Format footnote
  if (is.null(strata1_var)) {
    total_volume <- sum(outlet_counts$volume_n, na.rm = TRUE)
    outlet_text <- paste0(outlet_counts$outlet_label, "=", outlet_counts$volume_n, collapse = "; ")
    total_incomplete <- sum(outlet_counts$incomplete, na.rm = TRUE)
    return(paste0("Volume data were available for the following total number of diagnostic products=", 
                  total_volume, "; by outlet type: ", outlet_text, 
                  "; The number of diagnostic products with volume data, from outlets that met screening criteria for a full interview but did not complete the interview =", 
                  total_incomplete))
  } else {
    # For strata, return a list of footnotes
    footnotes <- list()
    strata_levels <- unique(outlet_counts$strata)
    
    for (strata_val in strata_levels) {
      strata_data <- outlet_counts %>% filter(strata == strata_val)
      total_volume <- sum(strata_data$volume_n, na.rm = TRUE)
      outlet_text <- paste0(strata_data$outlet_label, "=", strata_data$volume_n, collapse = "; ")
      total_incomplete <- sum(strata_data$incomplete, na.rm = TRUE)
      footnotes[[strata_val]] <- paste0(strata_val, " footnote: Volume data were available for the following total number of diagnostic products=", 
                                        total_volume, "; by outlet type: ", outlet_text,
                                        "; The number of diagnostic products with volume data, from outlets that met screening criteria for a full interview but did not complete the interview =", 
                                        total_incomplete)
    }
    return(footnotes)
  }
}
```

```{r run_analysis, include=FALSE}
# Initialize results storage
results_list <- list()
footnotes_list <- list()

# 1. National level results
national_results <- calculate_volume_medians(survey_design)
national_footnote <- calculate_footnotes(processed_data)

results_list[["national"]] <- national_results
footnotes_list[["national"]] <- national_footnote

# 2. Strata1 results (if available)
if (has_strata1) {
 strata1_results <- calculate_volume_medians(survey_design, group_vars = "strata1")
 
 if (nrow(strata1_results) > 0) {
   results_list[["strata1"]] <- strata1_results
   footnotes_list[["strata1"]] <- calculate_footnotes(
     processed_data, 
     strata1_var = strata_info$strata1$variable
   )
 }
}

# 3. Strata2 results (if available) 
if (has_strata2) {
 strata2_results <- calculate_volume_medians(survey_design, group_vars = "strata2")
 
 if (nrow(strata2_results) > 0) {
   results_list[["strata2"]] <- strata2_results
   footnotes_list[["strata2"]] <- calculate_footnotes(
     processed_data,
     strata2_var = strata_info$strata2$variable
   )
 }
}

# 4. Cross-stratification results (if both strata present)
if (cross_strata_possible) {
  strata1_values <- unique(survey_design$variables$strata1)
  strata1_values <- strata1_values[!is.na(strata1_values)]
  strata2_values <- unique(survey_design$variables$strata2) 
  strata2_values <- strata2_values[!is.na(strata2_values)]
  
  all_cross_results <- tibble()
  
  for (strata1_val in strata1_values) {
    for (strata2_val in strata2_values) {
      subset_condition <- survey_design$variables$strata1 == strata1_val & 
                         survey_design$variables$strata2 == strata2_val &
                         !is.na(survey_design$variables$strata1) &
                         !is.na(survey_design$variables$strata2)
      
      if (sum(subset_condition) > 10) {  # Need more observations for volume analysis
        subset_design <- subset(survey_design, subset_condition)
        
        combo_results <- calculate_volume_medians(subset_design)
        
        if (nrow(combo_results) > 0) {
          combo_results$strata1 <- strata1_val
          combo_results$strata2 <- strata2_val
          all_cross_results <- bind_rows(all_cross_results, combo_results)
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  if (nrow(all_cross_results) > 0) {
    for (strata1_val in strata1_values) {
      strata1_data <- all_cross_results %>% filter(strata1 == strata1_val)
      if (nrow(strata1_data) > 0) {
        cross_id <- paste0("cross_", strata1_val)
        results_list[[cross_id]] <- strata1_data
        
        processed_strata1 <- processed_data %>% filter(strata1 == strata1_val)
        footnotes_list[[cross_id]] <- calculate_footnotes(processed_strata1)
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```{r create_excel_function}
# Create Excel output using common function
source(here("Scripts", "3_Analysis", "create_excel_function.R"))

excel_success <- create_excel_output(
  results_list = results_list,
  footnotes_list = footnotes_list, 
  indicator_config = indicator_config,
  country = country,
  year = year,
  include_antimalarial_col = TRUE
)

if (!excel_success) {
  message("Unable to create Excel file")
} 
```

```{r analysis_summary, results='asis'}
cat("## Analysis Summary\n\n")
cat("**Data Processing:**\n\n")
cat("- Original products in dataset:", nrow(product_data), "\n")
cat("- Products with volume data included:", nrow(processed_data), "\n")
cat("- Survey design: Complex sampling with outlet weights\n")
cat("- Population: Products with volume data (booster==0)\n\n")

cat("**Stratification:**\n\n")
if (length(strata_info) > 0) {
  for (stratum_name in names(strata_info)) {
    stratum <- strata_info[[stratum_name]]
    cat("-", stratum_name, "(", length(stratum$values), "levels):", 
        paste(stratum$values, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  if (cross_strata_possible) {
    cat("- Cross-stratification: Available\n")
  }
  cat("\n")
} else {
  cat("- No stratification variables available\n\n")
}

available_volume_vars <- intersect(indicator_config$volume_vars, names(processed_data))
available_outlet_vars <- intersect(indicator_config$outlet_dummies, names(processed_data))

cat("**Available Products:**", length(available_volume_vars), "diagnostic categories\n\n")
cat("**Available Outlet Types:**", length(available_outlet_vars), "outlet types\n\n")
```

## Results

```{r figure_size_presets}
overall_base_size = 18
point_estimate_size = 4
```

#### Figure 1. Diagnostic Sales Volume Distribution by Diagnostic Type (National)

```{r figure_diagnostic_volume_national, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
if ("national" %in% names(results_list) && nrow(results_list[["national"]]) > 0) {
  
  # Get available diagnostic types from actual data
  available_diagnostic_types <- intersect(indicator_config$volume_vars, unique(results_list[["national"]]$antimalarial_type))
  
  # Focus on diagnostic types and aggregate across outlets
  diagnostic_volume_data <- results_list[["national"]] %>%
    filter(antimalarial_type %in% available_diagnostic_types) %>%
    group_by(antimalarial_type, antimalarial_label) %>%
    summarise(
      median = weighted.mean(point_estimate, sample_size, na.rm = TRUE),
      q25 = weighted.mean(lower_ci, sample_size, na.rm = TRUE), 
      q75 = weighted.mean(upper_ci, sample_size, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_sample = sum(sample_size, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(median))
  
  if (nrow(diagnostic_volume_data) > 0) {
    ggplot(diagnostic_volume_data, aes(x = fct_reorder(antimalarial_label, median), 
                               y = median)) +
      geom_col(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.8) +
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = q25, ymax = q75), 
                    width = 0.2, color = "black") +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(
        title = str_wrap("Median Sales Volume of Diagnostics by Type - National", width = 60),
        x = "Diagnostic Type",
        y = "Median Sales Volume (Tests)",
        caption = "Error bars show 25th and 75th percentiles (IQR)"
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = overall_base_size) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
      ) +
      scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15)))
  } else {
    cat("No diagnostic volume data available")
  }
} else {
  cat("No national data available")
}
```

#### Figure 2. Diagnostic Sales Volume by Diagnostic Type and Strata1

```{r figure_diagnostic_volume_strata1, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
if ("strata1" %in% names(results_list) && nrow(results_list[["strata1"]]) > 0) {
  
  available_diagnostic_types <- intersect(indicator_config$volume_vars, unique(results_list[["strata1"]]$antimalarial_type))
  
  strata1_diagnostic_volume <- results_list[["strata1"]] %>%
    filter(antimalarial_type %in% available_diagnostic_types) %>%
    group_by(antimalarial_type, antimalarial_label, strata1) %>%
    summarise(
      median = weighted.mean(point_estimate, sample_size, na.rm = TRUE),
      q25 = weighted.mean(lower_ci, sample_size, na.rm = TRUE),
      q75 = weighted.mean(upper_ci, sample_size, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  if (nrow(strata1_diagnostic_volume) > 0) {
    ggplot(strata1_diagnostic_volume, aes(x = fct_reorder(antimalarial_label, median),
                                  y = median, fill = strata1)) +
      geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = q25, ymax = q75), 
                    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.2) +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(
        title = str_wrap("Median Diagnostic Sales Volume by Type and Strata1", width = 60),
        x = "Diagnostic Type",
        y = "Median Sales Volume (Tests)",
        fill = "Strata1",
        caption = "Error bars show 25th and 75th percentiles (IQR)"
      ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = overall_base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.1), face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = rel(0.9)),
      axis.title = element_text(size = rel(1.0)),
      legend.position = "bottom") +
    scale_fill_brewer(type = "qual", palette = "Set1") +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15)))
  }
}
```

#### Figure 3. Any Diagnostic Sales Volume by Outlet Type and Strata1

```{r figure_anydiagnostic_outlet_strata1, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
if ("strata1" %in% names(results_list) && nrow(results_list[["strata1"]]) > 0) {
  
  strata1_anydiagnostic <- results_list[["strata1"]] %>%
    filter(antimalarial_type == "total")
  
  if (nrow(strata1_anydiagnostic) > 0) {
    ggplot(strata1_anydiagnostic, aes(x = fct_reorder(outlet_label, point_estimate), 
                              y = point_estimate, fill = strata1)) +
      geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
                    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.2) +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(
        title = str_wrap("Median Any Diagnostic Sales Volume by Outlet Type and Strata1", width = 60),
        x = "Outlet Type",
        y = "Median Sales Volume (Tests)",
        fill = "Strata1",
        caption = "Error bars show 25th and 75th percentiles (IQR)"
      ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = overall_base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.1), face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = rel(0.9)),
      axis.title = element_text(size = rel(1.0)),
      legend.position = "bottom") +
    scale_fill_brewer(type = "qual", palette = "Set1") +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15)))
  }
}
```

`r if(has_strata2) "#### Figure 4. Diagnostic Sales Volume by Type and Strata2"`

```{r figure_diagnostic_volume_strata2, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
if ("strata2" %in% names(results_list) && nrow(results_list[["strata2"]]) > 0) {
  
  available_diagnostic_types <- intersect(indicator_config$volume_vars, unique(results_list[["strata2"]]$antimalarial_type))
  
  strata2_diagnostic_volume <- results_list[["strata2"]] %>%
    filter(antimalarial_type %in% available_diagnostic_types) %>%
    group_by(antimalarial_type, antimalarial_label, strata2) %>%
    summarise(
      median = weighted.mean(point_estimate, sample_size, na.rm = TRUE),
      q25 = weighted.mean(lower_ci, sample_size, na.rm = TRUE),
      q75 = weighted.mean(upper_ci, sample_size, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  if (nrow(strata2_diagnostic_volume) > 0) {
    ggplot(strata2_diagnostic_volume, aes(x = fct_reorder(antimalarial_label, median), 
                                  y = median, fill = strata2)) +
      geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = q25, ymax = q75), 
                    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.2) +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(
        title = str_wrap("Median Diagnostic Sales Volume by Type and Strata2", width = 60),
        x = "Diagnostic Type",
        y = "Median Sales Volume (Tests)",
        fill = "Strata2",
        caption = "Error bars show 25th and 75th percentiles (IQR)"
      ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = overall_base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.1), face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = rel(0.9)),
      axis.title = element_text(size = rel(1.0)),
      legend.position = "bottom") +
    scale_fill_brewer(type = "qual", palette = "Set2") +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15)))
  }
}
```

`r if(has_strata2) "#### Figure 5. Any Diagnostic Sales Volume by Outlet Type and Strata2"`

```{r figure_anydiagnostic_outlet_strata2, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
if ("strata2" %in% names(results_list) && nrow(results_list[["strata2"]]) > 0) {
  
  strata2_anydiagnostic <- results_list[["strata2"]] %>%
    filter(antimalarial_type == "total")
  
  if (nrow(strata2_anydiagnostic) > 0) {
    ggplot(strata2_anydiagnostic, aes(x = fct_reorder(outlet_label, point_estimate), 
                              y = point_estimate, fill = strata2)) +
      geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
                    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.2) +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(
        title = str_wrap("Median Any Diagnostic Sales Volume by Outlet Type and Strata2", width = 60),
        x = "Outlet Type", 
        y = "Median Sales Volume (Tests)",
        fill = "Strata2",
        caption = "Error bars show 25th and 75th percentiles (IQR)"
      ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = overall_base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = rel(1.1), face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = rel(0.9)),
      axis.title = element_text(size = rel(1.0)),
      legend.position = "bottom") +
      scale_fill_brewer(type = "qual", palette = "Set2") +
      scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15)))
  }
}
```

`r if(cross_strata_possible) "#### Figure 6. Any Diagnostic Sales Volume by Outlet Type - Cross-Stratification"`
```{r figure_anydiagnostic_cross_strata, fig.width=14, fig.height=10}
if (cross_strata_possible) {
  cross_results <- names(results_list)[grepl("^cross_", names(results_list))]
  
  if (length(cross_results) > 0) {
    # Combine all cross-stratification results for plotting
    all_cross_data <- tibble()
    
    for (cross_name in cross_results) {
      cross_data <- results_list[[cross_name]] %>%
        filter(antimalarial_type == "total") %>%
        mutate(strata1_group = gsub("cross_", "", cross_name))
      all_cross_data <- bind_rows(all_cross_data, cross_data)
    }
    
    if (nrow(all_cross_data) > 0) {
      ggplot(all_cross_data, aes(x = fct_reorder(outlet_label, point_estimate), 
                                y = point_estimate, fill = strata2)) +
        geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
                      position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.2) +
        facet_wrap(~strata1_group, scales = "fixed") +
        coord_flip() +
        labs(
          title = str_wrap("Median Any Diagnostic Sales Volume by Outlet Type - Cross-Stratification", width = 60),
          x = "Outlet Type", 
          y = "Median Sales Volume (Tests)",
          fill = "Strata2",
          caption = "Error bars show 25th and 75th percentiles (IQR)"
        ) +
        theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "bottom",
          strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
        ) +
        scale_fill_brewer(type = "qual", palette = "Set1") +
        scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15)),
                          labels = scales::comma)
    }
  }
}
```
\newpage

## Tables

### Table 1: National Level Results - Volume by Diagnostic × Outlet Matrix

```{r table_national_volume, results='asis'}
if ("national" %in% names(results_list) && nrow(results_list[["national"]]) > 0) {
  
  # Create comprehensive table with volumes (median) as values
  volume_matrix <- results_list[["national"]] %>%
    select(antimalarial_label, outlet_label, point_estimate) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = outlet_label, values_from = point_estimate, values_fill = 0) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 1)))
  
  table_output <- knitr::kable(volume_matrix, format = "markdown", 
                              caption = "Median Sales Volume (tests per month)")
  cat(table_output, sep = "\n")
  cat("\n*", footnotes_list[["national"]], "*\n\n")
  
} else {
  cat("**No national level data available**\n\n")
}
```

## Technical Notes

**Survey Design:** Complex sampling with outlet weights (`wt_alloutlet`), cluster sampling (c4), stratification (strata1), and finite population correction (fpc).

**Population Filter:** Analysis limited to diagnostic products with volume data available (`!is.na(volume)`) and excluding booster samples (`booster == 0`).

**Statistical Method:** Survey-weighted quantiles (25th, 50th, and 75th percentiles) using `statar::pctile()` for weighted percentiles, with fallback to `survey` package's `svyquantile()`.

**Volume Measurement:** Sales volume measured as number of blood tests sold per outlet per specified time period.

**Results Structure:**  
- **National:** Overall volume medians across all outlets with volume data  
- **Strata1:** Volume medians by primary stratification variable (if present and varies)  
- **Strata2:** Volume medians by secondary stratification variable (if present and varies)  
- **Cross-stratification:** Volume medians by strata2 within each level of strata1 (if both strata present)  

**Excel Output:** Results exported to Excel workbook in `Results/Indicator 3.3/` directory using the shared `create_excel_output()` function. The workbook includes:  
- **National sheet:** Wide format with outlets as columns (Point/Lower/Upper estimates)  
- **Strata1 sheets:** Results by primary stratification (if available)  
- **Strata2 sheet:** Results by secondary stratification (if available)  
- **Cross-stratification sheets:** Results by strata1 × strata2 combinations (if available)  
- **Long Format sheet:** Complete detailed results with all metrics  

**Footnotes:** Include counts of diagnostic products with volume data by outlet type and counts of products from outlets that met screening criteria but did not complete interviews.

**Table Structure:**
- **Table 1:** National volume matrix (diagnostic × outlet, median values only) in Word document

**Data Standardization:** Results use common column structure where:  
- `point_estimate` = median sales volume (tests per month)  
- `lower_ci` = 25th percentile (Q25)  
- `upper_ci` = 75th percentile (Q75)  
- Column names use `antimalarial_type` and `antimalarial_label` for consistency with shared Excel functions, but contain diagnostic product types

**Stata Translation Notes:** This analysis replicates the Stata code in `3_3_Median_sales_volume_of_malaria_blood_tests.do`, using:  
- R variable names (e.g., `private_nonprofit`, `total_informal`) instead of Stata abbreviations (e.g., `pnp`, `inf`)  
- The same survey design specifications and percentile calculations (`_pctile volume [pw=wt_allOutlet]`)  
- Matching footnote structure and Excel output format  
- Same analysis structure as Indicator 3.1 (antimalarials), adapted for diagnostic products  

---

**Report generated:** `r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p')`
